Made from high Quality Materials With 2200-Watts of Boiling power.
Cord free Kettle Jar With detached base for easy day to day use. Indicator light in the on/off switch

We provide a 3 year Manufacture Guarantee, Please feel free to contact us regarding any use related issue.
description: Product Description Key Features paul russells Electric Plastic Kettle - 1.7 Litre, 2200-Watts fast Boil power Introducing the Paul Russells Electric Plastic Kettle: 2200W, 1.7L capacity, and Black in colour. Crafted from premium materials for durability and efficiency, delivering 2200-Watts of boiling power. Its cord-free design with a detachable base enhances everyday usability. It features an indicator light on the on/off switch for added convenience. The large manual opening facilitates easy cleaning, ensuring residue or limescale buildup is effortlessly addressed.
